title: Device Home Screen - Connecting multiple headsets
scenario: Verify that when multiple headsets are paired and connected, all connected devices are properly displayed on the device home page with navigation dots and swipe functionality.
steps: Pair and connect multiple headsets to the system.
Navigate to the device home page.
Observe the dots at the bottom of the screen indicating the number of connected devices.
Check that the number of dots matches the number of connected devices.
Identify which dot is highlighted to indicate the currently displayed device.
Swipe left to view the next connected device.
Swipe right to view the previous connected device.
Verify that all connected devices are properly displayed when swiping through them.
expected: All connected devices are properly displayed on the device home page. Dots at the bottom indicate the number of connected devices and which device is currently displayed. Users can swipe left or right to view each connected device.
